page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6a.32xlarge is a compute-optimized instance belonging to the ecs.c6a server family. It is powered by an x86_64 AMD EPYC 7H12 processor operating at a base frequency of 2.6 GHz. The instance features 128 dedicated physical cores and 128 vCPUs, utilizing a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration. It is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance operates on the KVM hypervisor and does not include any local storage, requiring external network-attached storage solutions. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps. There are no complimentary public IPv4 addresses bundled with this server configuration, and it does not feature any GPU hardware accelerators.

Given its high core density and 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the ecs.c6a.32xlarge offers qualitative cost efficiency for highly parallelized, compute-bound workloads that do not require massive memory footprints. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent performance without resource contention. It is suited for workloads such as high-performance computing, batch processing, scientific modeling, and large-scale web serving.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6a.32xlarge is a compute-optimized instance powered by an AMD EPYC 7H12 processor running at 2.6 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. It features 128 dedicated physical cores and 128 vCPUs with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, paired with 256.0 GB of system memory. This resource allocation provides a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, optimizing the instance for compute-heavy tasks. The server operates on the KVM hypervisor, lacks local storage, and delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps. It does not include GPU accelerators or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This configuration is designed for parallel processing workloads, scientific simulations, and compute-intensive enterprise applications requiring dedicated CPU resources.

tagline: A high-density compute instance featuring one hundred twenty-eight dedicated AMD cores and a balanced two-to-one vCPU-to-RAM ratio.

256.0 GB of system memory with a 2.0 GB per core ratio
